examples: Because of its sugar content, it is called a glycoprotein.
Glycoprotein that is mainly involved in the control of neutrophil elastase activity.
One promising discovery is a glycoprotein which prevents Antarctic fish from freezing.
But those with high P-glycoprotein were up to 20 times more resistant to doxorubicin and up to 300 times more resistant to vinblastine.
